description: Stable test definitions for every registry tests[] reference. P0/P1 entries are automation targets; P2 entries may use generated fixtures from the same base fixture.

tests.purpose: Validate registry contract for upstream_stanza_annotation_failed, upstream_failure_status_seen.
assertions: actual JSON result validates against the public output schema when a JSON result is produced
top-level error.code, diagnostics[].code, and quality issue code locations contain every expected code declared by this entry
document is preserved byte-for-byte/deep-equal on success and absent on top-level failure
summary/count fields match emitted quality records or failure contract
normalization removes only timestamps/durations/debug/temp paths explicitly allowed by the testing guide
tests.normalization: Use golden normalization rules from testing guide section 6.

tests.purpose: Verify that unsupported schema version is reported before upstream failure status when both conditions are present.
assertions: result.status == failed
result.error.code == unsupported_stanza_schema
diagnostics contains unsupported_input_schema_version at /schema_version
diagnostics does not contain upstream_failure_status_seen
document and quality are absent
CLI exit code == 1
tests.normalization: Use golden normalization rules from testing guide section 6.
